component.name: Sigillum
component.summary: Sign, timestamp and verify digital documents
Firma, marca temporale e verifica documenti digitali

description.p: Sigillum is a desktop application for digital signature and time-stamping of documents according to ETSI / eIDAS standards. It supports the PAdES (PDF), CAdES (.p7m) and XAdES (XML) formats, both at level B (basic) and level T (with timestamp), and can apply or verify standalone RFC 3161 time stamps (.tsr / .tsd).

Sigillum è un'applicazione desktop per la firma digitale e la marca temporale di documenti conformi agli standard ETSI / eIDAS. Supporta i formati PAdES (PDF), CAdES (.p7m) e XAdES (XML), sia a livello B che T (con marca temporale), e produce/verifica marche temporali RFC 3161 standalone (.tsr / .tsd).

ul.li: Sign with a PKCS#12 file or a PKCS#11 hardware token (YubiKey, Bit4id Digital-DNA Key, smartcards via OpenSC)
Auto-detection of PKCS#11 drivers and tokens
RFC 3161 time-stamping, including HTTP Basic Auth for qualified Italian TSAs (Aruba PEC, InfoCert, Namirial)
Standalone file time-stamping in TSR and TSD format
Visible PAdES signature with optional logo and graphical box positioning on a PDF preview
Trust chain validation against the Italian AgID Trust List, with background auto-refresh

description.p: Explicit CAdES/PAdES/XAdES selector on the Sign tab; multi-signer and nested-CMS aware Verify; extract the original document from a .p7m via new `sigillum extract` CLI and GUI button; passwordless PKCS#12 files accepted; bash/zsh shell completion shipped.

GUI keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Q/W to quit, Ctrl+1..6 to switch tab, Ctrl+, for Settings). User-configurable PKCS#11 driver search paths with auto-detect quick-add. Confirm dialog on leaving Settings with unsaved changes. Published to PyPI and packaged as .deb/.rpm via GitHub Actions.
